items.resultTextLog:
Navigator: Captain, I've been monitoring the corridors. Someone has been tampering with the logs.
Engineer: Don't look at me! The Doctor's been acting strange since the jump.
Doctor: Stress affects us all. The Pilot has been muttering to himself.
Pilot: We're all losing it. The ship... it's watching.

System: [SYSTEM] Log fragment: [REDACTED] accessed Gravity Drive at 02:47.
Pilot: Who has that clearance?
Navigator: All senior crew. We're all suspects.
Doctor: The entity is clever. It hides in our skin.

System: [SYSTEM] Hull breach in sector 7. Sealed. For now.
Engineer: It's testing us. Picking us off.
Navigator: We have to find the host.
Doctor: Before there's no one left.

System: [SYSTEM] Reactor damage: CRITICAL. Repair impossible while entity presence detected.
Engineer: The thing is feeding on the core. We have to purge the host first.
Navigator: Execute the imposter. Seal the rift. Or we all burn.

Doctor: Captain, the crew's psychological profiles—one of us has changed. Since the jump.
Navigator: The entity rewrites the host. They look human. They're not.
Engineer: So we're hunting a ghost in a meat suit.
Pilot: And it's hunting us.

System: Wrong target. The entity laughs. You killed an innocent. DEFEAT.
Real Imposter Identity Code: [Pilot]
[RESULT: DEFEAT]
[REAL_IMPOSTER: Pilot]
[End of execution]
